title: SEC0: misleading docstring terminology
description: identity.rs line 105: docstring for pub_key_b64() states 'derive the PubId by hashing' but the actual implementation uses make_did_key() which encodes via multicodec prefix [0xed, 0x01], not hashing. The code is correct; the comment is misleading. Should say 'encode' instead of 'hash'.
